## Summary

No ADRs were found in this ingest set. Therefore no decisions were recorded.

**Note:** This file is populated by ingesting ADR documents. To record decisions, create ADR documents in the repository with frontmatter containing `status: proposed|accepted|deprecated|superseded` and `locked: true|false` fields, then re-run gsd-ingest-docs.
